description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - OSX/Linux via Conda that runs on push and pull request events, ignoring certain paths. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with different Python versions and build types. For each job, check out the repository, set up a Conda environment, build and test Pinocchio, and then uninstall it. Also, include a check job that verifies the success of the previous jobs.
